title: Create test gun JSON data pack for M1 verification

reference_files.reason: Gun data pack JSON format - field structure for test gun
Preset attribute table - valid attribute values for test gun stats
M1 verification criteria - test gun for /attribute command check

acceptance_criteria: Test gun JSON file created at src/main/resources/data/modularshoot/modularshoot/guns/test_gun.json
JSON contains valid gun definition with name, texture path, and stats for all 9 preset attributes

Stats values are reasonable test values (e.g., hit_damage=10.0, fire_rate=2.0, range=80.0, accuracy_yaw=5.0, accuracy_pitch=5.0, entity_penetration=0, bullet_speed=30.0, bullet_size=0.5, block_penetration=0)
traits field present as empty object {}
slots field present (can be empty object {} for M1 test)
sounds field present with a shoot sound ID
JSON syntax is valid and matches GunDefinition Codec format
Gun loads successfully at runtime (appears in creative tab, /attribute command shows values when held)
